scenario_title: Disruptive impulses in a gym environment
minimal_context: The student is participating in a PE lesson in the gym and waiting by the equipment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to start the PE lesson in the gym now. Please stand next to the equipment and wait.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm going to stand over here by the tall boxes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands by the boxes, looking at the top of them) Yeah, okay.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I am going to turn around and check the mats behind me.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Climbs up and jumps off the equipment) Because you can jump off the things when Sir turns his back away yeh.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going to start the PE lesson in the gym now. Please stand next to the equipment and wait.

STUDENT: I'm going to stand over here by the tall boxes.

TUTOR: Alright, just wait there.

STUDENT: (Stands by the boxes, looking at the top of them) Yeah, okay.

TUTOR: I am going to turn around and check the mats behind me.

STUDENT: (Climbs up and jumps off the equipment) Because you can jump off the things when Sir turns his back away yeh.

task.content: Participating in a PE lesson in the gym

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When Sir turns his back away
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Inability to control impulses resulting from boredom in other contexts, product of the temptations
related_quotes: Because you can jump off the things when Sir turns his back away yeh.

behavior_patterns.condition: When faced with temptations in the gym environment
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Potentially disruptive behaviours that were a product of the temptations
